title: Sidecar vs. Ambient: Telemetry Reliability and Automated Canary Remediation in a GitOps-Managed Kubernetes Environment - Thesis Artifact
description: Companion artifact for the bachelor thesis at Hochschule Campus Wien (BSc Computer Science and Digital Communications, SS 2026). Contains all Argo CD Applications, Argo Rollouts canary definitions, Argo Events EventSources/Sensors, Argo Workflow templates, PrometheusRule alerts, Grafana dashboards, experiment scripts, statistical analysis, and example results that together reproduce the comparative study of Istio sidecar (1.28.3) and Istio ambient (1.29.0) modes on a 2-node k3s cluster.
